summary: From lockdown thrillers to experimental dramas, Indian filmmakers are increasingly turning to iPhones and smartphones to shoot acclaimed films and shorts. Backed by initiatives like MAMI’s smartphone filmmaking programme, directors are proving that strong storytelling matters more than equipment.

summary: Google claims to have thwarted a significant cyberattack by state-sponsored hackers using an AI-developed zero-day exploit. The vulnerability, which bypassed two-factor authentication in an unnamed tool, was disclosed to the vendor before widespread exploitation could occur.

summary: OpenAI is stepping up its game by partnering with top European firms such as Deutsche Telekom, BBVA, and Telefonica to leverage its sophisticated AI models. This initiative aims to empower these organizations with tools to bolster their defenses against emerging cyber threats.

title: Waymo recalls 3,800 robotaxis over risk of entering flooded roads
summary: In a proactive safety measure, Waymo is recalling nearly 3,800 of its autonomous vehicles from the U.S. market, triggered by an episode involving a car that drove onto a flooded street. title: South Korea official floats AI profit social tax as tech giants boom
summary: A top South Korean official has proposed a tax on AI profits to be redistributed among society as a semiconductor boom drives massive earnings for tech giants Samsung Electronics and SK hynix. title: EBay rejects GameStop's audacious $56 billion takeover bid
summary: EBay has rejected a massive $56 billion takeover offer from GameStop. EBay cited doubts about GameStop's financing for the deal. The company is confident in its current growth strategy. GameStop's CEO had proposed cost cuts and synergies.

title: TikTok challenges EU 'gatekeeper' status at Europe's top court
summary: TikTok is fighting its EU 'gatekeeper' status in court. The company argues it does not meet the strict criteria set by the Digital Markets Act. This case could significantly impact how Europe regulates big tech firms. A ruling is expected in the coming months.

title: AI that talks back in real time: Mira Murati’s Thinking Machines unveils ‘interaction models’
summary: Thinking Machines Lab, founded by Mira Murati, has introduced "interaction models," an AI approach designed for real-time, natural conversations. This new system continuously processes information and responds simultaneously, unlike current AI that waits for complete prompts.

title: Waymo to recall nearly 3,800 robotaxis over self-driving software issue
summary: Waymo is recalling thousands of its self-driving robotaxis in the US. A software flaw could cause the vehicles to drive onto flooded roads.
